notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG idiosyncratic-momentum basket from approved card SHPAK-IDMOM-2017_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1 and evaluate the paired package rather than standalone legs. At each broker-month transition, reconstruct eleven completed monthly returns, remove each energy leg's exposure to a fixed equal-weight XTI/XNG/XAU/XAG price factor, buy higher cumulative residual momentum, and short lower. XAU and XAG are read-only factor members. Missing source term-structure/size factors, working-paper evidence quality, four-CFD proxy, futures/CFD basis, and two-name breadth are binding Q02 falsification risks.
